mapper.select: SELECT * FROM announcement ORDER BY id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO announcement (title, content, publisher_id, publisher_name, target_role, status, publish_time) VALUES (#{title}, #{content}, #{publisherId}, #{publisherName}, #{targetRole}, #{status}, #{publishTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE announcement SET title=#{title}, content=#{content}, publisher_id=#{publisherId}, publisher_name=#{publisherName}, target_role=#{targetRole}, status=#{status}, publish_time=#{publishTime} WHERE id = #{id}
